scripts.start: concurrently -n PORTAL,VUE,REACT,ANGULAR -c auto "npm run portal" "npm --workspace 01-verificador-elegibilidad-vue run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173" "npm --workspace 02-postulacion-documentos-react run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5174" "npm --workspace 03-seguimiento-solicitud-angular run start -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4200"
scripts.build: vite build && npm --workspace 01-verificador-elegibilidad-vue run build && npm --workspace 02-postulacion-documentos-react run build && npm --workspace 03-seguimiento-solicitud-angular run build -- --base-href /angular/ && node scripts/build-integrado.mjs
